name: Dr. James Okenwa
title: Professor
courses: STS 434 Applied Statistics for Data Science

constraints.additional_duties: Tenured. No institutional pressure. Participates only because Dean asked.

accreditation_notes: MAT 228 is a service course for engineering and science programs. Not directly accredited but feeds into ABET-accredited programs.
motivation: Agreed to participate only because Dean asked. Willing to listen but pushes back on anything compromising rigor. Secretly curious about modernizing STS 434 for industry data science roles.
